# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- When applying UI changes, preserve existing layout behavior and avoid modifications that can hide entire views; verify visual container docking logic carefully.

## Memory
- Remember the last few interactions and context to provide better suggestions.
- Use the context to avoid repeating information and provide concise suggestions.
- When applying UI changes, preserve existing layout behavior and avoid modifications that can hide entire views; verify visual container docking logic carefully.
